// Dashboard.js - Improved Churn Rate Prediction Display import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } // Enhanced data with visual elements const analysisData = { churnRisk: 16.1, retentionProbability: 83.9, riskLevel: "low", confidence: 92, trend: "decreasing", // increasing, decreasing, stable lastMonthComparison: -2.3, executiveSummary: { riskProbability: 16.15, category: "stable", riskLevel: "low immediate risk", recommendation: "proceeding directly to the action plan below", primaryRiskFactor: "Tenure" }, comparisonMetrics: { churnRisk: { current: "16.1%", target: "133.06%", comparison: "None" }, tenure: { current: "5.0 mo", target: "44.4%", comparison: "None" }, daysSinceOrder: { current: "7.0 d", target: "40.6%", comparison: "None" }, satisfaction: { current: "3.0/5", target: "2.5.0%", comparison: "None" } }, businessImpact: { estimatedCV: "¥16,250", retentionBudget: "¥812", potentialLoss: "¥2,624", roiPotential: "2.2x" } }; // Improved Churn Prediction Display Component const ChurnPredictionDisplay = () => (

🎯 Churn Risk Prediction

🎯 {analysisData.confidence}% Confidence
{/* Main Risk Gauge */}
{analysisData.churnRisk}%
Churn Probability
Low (0-30%)
Medium (31-70%)
High (71-100%)
{/* Risk Details */}
{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK
{analysisData.trend === 'decreasing' ? '↘' : analysisData.trend === 'increasing' ? '↗' : '→'} {Math.abs(analysisData.lastMonthComparison)}%
Churn Risk {analysisData.churnRisk}%
Retention Probability {analysisData.retentionProbability}%
{/* Quick Insights */}

📈 Quick Insights

✅
Low Risk Category Customer shows minimal churn signals
⚠️
Monitor Tenure Short customer history increases risk
📊
High Retention Prob 84% chance of customer retention
🎯
Proactive Care Recommended budget: ¥812
); // Improved Overview Tab const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Enhanced Churn Prediction Display */} {/* Executive Summary Section */}

Churn Risk Analysis Report

{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK ({analysisData.churnRisk}%): Primary risk factor identified as {analysisData.executiveSummary.primaryRiskFactor}.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This customer is currently evaluated at a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskProbability}% churn probability and is categorized as {analysisData.executiveSummary.category} and poses a {analysisData.executiveSummary.riskLevel}. We recommend {analysisData.executiveSummary.recommendation}.

{/* Comparison Metrics in Modern Cards */}
Current Churn Risk
-2.3%
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.churnRisk.target}
Customer Tenure
+1.2%
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.tenure.target}
Days Since Last Order
0%
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.daysSinceOrder.target}
Satisfaction Score
-0.8%
{analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.current}
vs Target: {analysisData.comparisonMetrics.satisfaction.target}
{/* Business Impact Analysis */}

Business Impact Analysis

💰
{analysisData.businessImpact.estimatedCV} Estimated Customer Value
🛡️
{analysisData.businessImpact.retentionBudget} Retention Budget
⚠️
{analysisData.businessImpact.potentialLoss} Potential Loss
📈
{analysisData.businessImpact.roiPotential} ROI Potential
); return (

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Advanced predictive analytics for customer retention

{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()}
); } export default Dashboard;
